reason: The finding description explicitly states that enabling FIPS mode on a preexisting system is not supported and that if the rule fails on an installed system, it is a permanent finding. Modifying dracut configurations to enable FIPS involves kernel-level changes and boot-time modules which can lead to boot failure or system instability if not handled during initial installation.
estimated_impact: reboot required; Kernel-level configuration change; Potential for boot failure; FIPS mode enablement is not supported on preexisting systems; Changes affect the initramfs/boot process
